name: FinRAG — Indian Mutual Fund Intelligence
description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that enables natural language queries over Indian mutual fund datasets using ChromaDB and Groq LLM.

name: MS Dhoni ODI Performance Dashboard
description: A data visualization project analyzing MS Dhoni’s ODI batting performance (2005–2014) against international teams using interactive charts and dashboards to uncover scoring patterns, boundary distribution, and performance trends.

name: Zepto Inventory & Product Sales Analysis
description: A Power BI dashboard analyzing Zepto’s inventory and product sales data to uncover insights on sales performance, discount strategies, product categories, and stock availability.
